articles.title: Jackson Mann site could include housing, study finds ahead of community meeting

articles.title: Red Sox beat Royals 3-1 behind Willson Contreras’ homer and Sonny Gray’s strong outing
articles.description:
Gray (5-1) allowed one run on five hits in six-plus innings. He struck out nine and walked one. He has given up two runs over 16 innings (1.13 ERA) since returning from the injured list on May 6.

The post Red Sox beat Royals 3-1 behind Willson Contreras’ homer and Sonny Gray’s strong outing appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox defeated Royals 3-1 on May 18, improving their season record.
Sonny Gray pitched six-plus innings, striking out nine and earning his fifth win.
Contreras' homer contributed to the win, boosting team morale for Boston fans.

articles.title: Mark Fuhrman, flawed witness in O.J. Simpson trial, dies at 74
articles.description:
A Los Angeles police detective, he was discredited during Mr. Simpson’s 1995 murder trial by defense lawyers who pointed to his past use of racist language.

The post Mark Fuhrman, flawed witness in O.J. Simpson trial, dies at 74 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mark Fuhrman, controversial LAPD detective, died at 74 on May 18, 2026.
He was discredited during the 1995 O.J. Simpson trial for racist remarks.
His death may reignite discussions on racial bias in law enforcement in Boston.
